action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent token/feature mismatch error (240 vs 240) on first forward despite printed match; train.py truncated at labels assignment causing incomplete execution; test_prep and predict.py look solid. Analysis: Wrong model class (Qwen2VL instead of Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration) loads incorrect modeling_qwen2_vl.py forward/get_placeholder_mask for the Qwen2.5-VL-3B weights (different placeholder logic/version), explaining why check fails even on matching counts; truncation prevents full loop/optimizer/save. Root fix: use correct Qwen2_5_VL* class in BOTH scripts, provide FULL non-truncated train.py completing the loop (loss, backward, step, metrics.jsonl logging, proper labels via assistant header search), save adapter+processor+grid_size.json. Keep small scale (64 samples/32 steps) for fast ~30s iter per guidelines. This follows recommended Qwen2.5-VL LoRA SFT for grounding and will produce first successful checkpoint + eval. Decision: Overwrite train.py and predict.py with complete fixed versions using correct model class, run test_prep+train, then submit_eval for first grounding_score + time measurement before scaling data/epochs/LR/rank.
